prompt: Draft a follow-up email to a client who hasn't responded in 2 weeks about a project proposal. Keep it professional and concise. Include: greeting, reminder, call to action, closing.
Write an incident notification email about a 30-minute database outage that affected the billing system. Include: what happened, impact, resolution, next steps.

Classify the tone of this email as: formal, informal, urgent, neutral.

Hi team, just a quick heads up - the deploy is going out at 3pm today. Nothing major, just some bug fixes. Cheers!
